regions.content:
1. 1.本图适用电机轴:<=35x70L；电机轴用锁紧带键一体轴。 This figure applies to the motor shaft: <=35x70L; Motor shaft is locked by locker.
  2. 2.减速机速比:(81,101,129,145,171):1 (轴输出)。 Speed reduction ratio: (81,101,129,145,171):1 (shaft output).
  3. 3.润滑油脂: VIGO GREASE RE0或RE-00 (MOLYWHITE)。 Lubricants: VIGO GREASE RE0 or RE-00 (MOLYWHITE).
  4. 4.额定输出扭矩: 1568N.m (输出转速: 15R/Min)。 Rated output torque: 1568N.m (output speed: 15R/Min).
  5. 5.电机安装法兰依电机型号提供。 The motor mounting flange is supplied according to the motor type.

  3. 3. Lubricating grease: VIGO GREASE RE0 or RE-00(MOLYWHITE). Lubricants: VIGO GREASE RE0 or RE-00(MOLYWHITE).
  4. 4. Rated output torque: 1568N.m(output speed: 15R/Min). Rated output torque: 1568N.m(output speed: 15R/Min).

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果

抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
